category_sources: Official GitHub README states Csmith's purpose is finding compiler bugs with random programs.
source_facts.description identifies Csmith as a generator of random C99 programs.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README and source_facts.homepage use the Csmith project name.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface for Csmith.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/csmith-project/csmith; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe random C program generation for compiler testing.
